ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "matchday" INTEGER /* Matchday number within the season */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the match took place */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the match started */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team in the match */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team in the match */,
  "full_time_score" TEXT /* Full-time score of the match */,
  "half_time_score" TEXT /* Half-time score of the match */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the match was played */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., scheduled, ongoing, completed, postponed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_matchday FOREIGN KEY ("matchday") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation used for the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's coach */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's home stadium */,
  "foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the season belongs to */,
  "current_round" INTEGER /* Current round or matchday in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., Forward, Midfielder) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's statistics */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference (goals_for - goals_against) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "appearances" INTEGER /* Number of appearances */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating per match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the injured player */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury sustained */,
  "date_sustained" TEXT /* Date when the injury was sustained */,
  "expected_recovery" TEXT /* Expected recovery time */,
  "medical_report" TEXT /* Detailed medical report of the injury */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (e.g., current, recovered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fan, team staff, league official) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "accessed_data" TEXT /* Description of the data accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being predicted */,
  "predicted_outcome" TEXT /* Predicted outcome of the match */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model used */,
  "actual_outcome" TEXT /* Actual outcome after the match is completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
